message:
test(fixtures): add three workspace-failure fixtures for external-filesystem-interference cases

Adds three new replay fixtures to the workspace_failures corpus, each
pinning the expected command outcomes for a case the replay harness
previously wasn't exercising. Keeps the fixtures-as-contracts pattern
used by the existing entries in tests/fixtures/workspace_failures/.

- tests/fixtures/workspace_failures/journal_sidecar_leftover/: a
  leftover SQLite rollback-journal sidecar from an interrupted writer.
  Database and JSONL content are otherwise healthy, so the fixture
  isolates the stale-journal signal. Contract: startup/open success,
  create success, doctor doctor_clean, sync --status in_sync,
  expected_classification healthy. Documents that the current posture
  is tolerated as clean. Sources from beads_rust-rsei.3.3.
- tests/fixtures/workspace_failures/orphan_shm_sidecar/: a shared-memory
  (-shm) sidecar present without the matching -wal file — the mirror
  of the existing sidecar_wal_without_shm fixture. Covers the "broken
  pair" branch where only one half of the WAL sidecar pair remains.
- tests/fixtures/workspace_failures/orphaned_lock_file/: an
  .oldformat/.lock or equivalent lock file left behind after a crashed
  process or a killed CLI invocation. Contract pins the expected
  clean-up behavior on next command.

Each fixture ships the standard layout under the directory name:
  - .beads/ and beads/ populated with the seed state
  - fixture.json with name, family (external_interference),
    description, expected_classification, expected_command_outcomes
    across the four replay surfaces (startup/open, create, doctor,
    sync --status), source_hint, and notes.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+# Database
+*.db
+*.db-journal
+*.db-shm
+*.db-wal
+
+# Lock files
+*.lock
+
+# Temporary
+last-touched
+*.tmp
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# Sync state (local-only, per-machine)
+.sync.lock
+sync_base.jsonl
+
+# Merge artifacts (temporary files from 3-way merge)
+beads.base.jsonl
+beads.base.meta.json
+beads.left.jsonl
+beads.left.meta.json
+beads.right.jsonl
+beads.right.meta.json
+
+# Daemon runtime files
+daemon.lock
+daemon.log
+daemon.pid
+bd.sock
+sync-state.json
+
+# Worktree redirect file
+redirect
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+{
+  "name": "journal_sidecar_leftover",
+  "family": "external_interference",
+  "description": "The workspace includes a leftover SQLite rollback journal sidecar from an interrupted writer or external filesystem interruption.",
+  "expected_classification": "healthy",
+  "expected_command_outcomes": [
+    {
+      "surface": "startup/open",
+      "outcome": "success"
+    },
+    {
+      "surface": "create",
+      "outcome": "success"
+    },
+    {
+      "surface": "doctor",
+      "outcome": "doctor_clean"
+    },
+    {
+      "surface": "sync --status",
+      "outcome": "status_in_sync"
+    }
+  ],
+  "source_hint": "Covers the interrupted atomic write / external filesystem interference branch from beads_rust-rsei.3.3.",
+  "notes": [
+    "The database and JSONL content are otherwise healthy so the fixture isolates the stale rollback journal signal.",
+    "Current posture is tolerated as clean by doctor; the fixture documents that behavior as an explicit replay contract."
+  ]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+{
+  "name": "orphan_shm_sidecar",
+  "family": "sidecar_mismatch",
+  "description": "The workspace includes a stray SHM sidecar without the matching WAL sidecar, matching an interrupted or externally pruned SQLite sidecar pair.",
+  "expected_classification": "degraded",
+  "expected_command_outcomes": [
+    {
+      "surface": "startup/open",
+      "outcome": "success"
+    },
+    {
+      "surface": "create",
+      "outcome": "success"
+    },
+    {
+      "surface": "doctor",
+      "outcome": "reports_errors"
+    },
+    {
+      "surface": "doctor --repair",
+      "outcome": "repair_applied"
+    },
+    {
+      "surface": "sync --status",
+      "outcome": "status_in_sync"
+    }
+  ],
+  "source_hint": "Complements the WAL-without-SHM fixture with the opposite external sidecar-pruning shape from beads_rust-rsei.3.3.",
+  "notes": [
+    "The database and JSONL content are otherwise healthy so the fixture isolates the orphaned SHM sidecar.",
+    "Current posture is degraded but repairable: doctor reports the sidecar mismatch and doctor --repair quarantines the stray sidecar."
+  ]
+}

+  "description": "The workspace includes an orphaned .beads.lock file left behind by a killed process or external sync tool.",
+  "expected_classification": "healthy",
+  "expected_command_outcomes": [

+    },

+    "The lock file is intentionally stale metadata, not an active lock held by this test process.",

+  ]
+}
